records.m_Talk_ENG: Blood... Lucia Ridge, your blood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blood... Lucia Ridge, your blood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blood... Lucia Ridge, your blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, what did you do to your body?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, what did you do to your body?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, what did you do to your body?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The El... ixir... I mixed... with your blood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The El... ixir... I mixed... with your blood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The El... ixir... I mixed... with your blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this... I can win...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this... I can win...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this... I can win...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Injecting both the Elixir and my blood into a body that's already at its limit...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Injecting both the Elixir and my blood into a body that's already at its limit...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Injecting both the Elixir and my blood into a body that's already at its limit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even realize what kind of side effects that could cause?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even realize what kind of side effects that could cause?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even realize what kind of side effects that could cause?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it means getting my hands on you... it is a small price to pay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it means getting my hands on you... it is a small price to pay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it means getting my hands on you... it is a small price to pay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blessed flesh of the Moon... give it to me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blessed flesh of the Moon... give it to me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blessed flesh of the Moon... give it to me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: First a nun who sees me as food, now a rich C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: First a nun who sees me as food, now a rich C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: First a nun who sees me as food, now a rich C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've gotta be kidding me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've gotta be kidding me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've gotta be kidding me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not dying here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not dying here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not dying here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't survive all this just to become your cadaver!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't survive all this just to become your cadaver!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't survive all this just to become your cadaver!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. The Corruption rays are getting stronger again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. The Corruption rays are getting stronger again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. The Corruption rays are getting stronger again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it because he couldn't accept my blood and became a C.O...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it because he couldn't accept my blood and became a C.O...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it because he couldn't accept my blood and became a C.O...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, this isn't the time to be thinking about that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, this isn't the time to be thinking about that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, this isn't the time to be thinking about that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have to take that bastard down, no matter what!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have to take that bastard down, no matter what!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have to take that bastard down, no matter what!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That way, I can survive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That way, I can survive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That way, I can survive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't die before I cure myself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't die before I cure myself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't die before I cure myself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can do this, Lucia Ridge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can do this, Lucia Ridge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can do this, Lucia Ridge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take him down... and loot this estate for everything it's worth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take him down... and loot this estate for everything it's worth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take him down... and loot this estate for everything it's worth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right! You've got this, Lucia!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right! You've got this, Lucia!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right! You've got this, Lucia!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come at me, you treasure goblin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come at me, you treasure goblin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come at me, you treasure goblin!
